researched_category.notes: Smartsheet is a cloud-based work management platform used for project management, task tracking, portfolio management, and collaboration using a spreadsheet-like interface.

one_liner.value: Cloud-based work management and collaboration platform for project, task, and portfolio management with a spreadsheet-like interface, automation, and AI capabilities.
one_liner.notes: The official site describes it as 'Intelligent Work Management Platform' that unites people, data and AI.

methods.notes: Two main authentication methods: (1) Personal Access Token / API Key (Bearer token in Authorization header) for direct machine-to-machine access, generated from the Smartsheet UI. (2) OAuth 2.0 (3-legged) for user-consent scenarios, with registered apps in Developer Tools.

access.notes: The API requires a Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plan. A free 30-day trial (with Business plan access) is available, during which you can generate API tokens. Developer Tools registration for OAuth requires 'a licensed Smartsheet user on a Business plan or higher.' Ongoing API access requires a paid Business plan ($24/user/month) or higher.

summary.value: Comprehensive REST API at https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0 covering sheets, rows, columns, cells, workspaces, folders, reports, dashboards (sights), discussions, comments, attachments, users, groups, webhooks, automation rules, events, cross-sheet references, cell history, and more. Official SDKs for Python, Java, C#, and JavaScript/Node.js. Rate-limited with 1 billion calls/day across the platform.
summary.notes: The API is well-documented with OpenAPI specs, interactive Try-it editors, and code snippets in multiple languages.

agent_interface.mcp_endpoint: https://github.com/smartsheet-platform/smar-mcp (deprecated, replaced by official Smartsheet MCP Server)
agent_interface.notes: Smartsheet launched an official MCP server (March 2026) that provides 30+ tools for AI agents. The MCP server uses OAuth 2.0 or personal access tokens. A community/third-party MCP server from StackOne offers 189 actions. The earlier official MCP repo (smartsheet-platform/smar-mcp) is now deprecated in favor of the new official server. Composio does not currently list a dedicated Smartsheet toolkit.

rationale.value: Smartsheet is fully buildable as an agent toolkit today. It has a well-documented public REST API with broad coverage, official SDKs in 4 languages, official MCP server support, and OAuth 2.0 for user delegation. The only material consideration is that API access requires a Business plan or higher (paid), but a 30-day free trial is available. The official MCP server announcement explicitly invites developers to connect any MCP-compliant AI tool to Smartsheet data, making agent integration straightforward.
rationale.notes: The main practical consideration is the paid plan requirement for API access, but this does not prevent building an agent toolkit — it just means developers need a Business plan or trial.

s1.quote: Smartsheet is the Intelligent Work Management Platform that unites people, data and AI to turn strategy into measurable enterprise impact.
s1.title: Smartsheet - Intelligent Work Management Platform

s2.quote: API calls - x (under Business plan column, absent from Pro plan)
s2.title: Smartsheet Pricing

s3.quote: The API authenticates using access tokens (API keys). You can generate access tokens in the Smartsheet UI. Each API request requires passing in an access token as the Bearer value in your authorization header.
s3.title: Authentication - Smartsheet API

s4.quote: OAuth 2.0 (OAuth) provides a way for your app users to grant limited access to their Smartsheet resources.
s4.title: OAuth - Smartsheet API

s5.quote: Required plan: Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management
s5.title: Smartsheet API introduction

s6.quote: The email address used to register for Developer Tools must belong to an existing licensed Smartsheet user on a Business plan or higher.
s6.title: Register for Smartsheet Developer Tools

s7.quote: The trial gives you access to a Business plan.
s7.title: FAQ: Smartsheet free trial

s8.quote: Making your first API call is as easy as generating an API access token and sending a request to one of our API endpoints.
s8.title: Get Started - Smartsheet API

s9.quote: The Smartsheet API enables you to access and manage your organization's Smartsheet resources programmatically. Here are some of the things you can do: Read and update sheets, Manage folders and workspaces, Administer Smartsheet plans and user accounts.
s9.title: Smartsheet API Reference - Postman

s10.quote: The Smartsheet MCP Server is an open, protocol-based integration layer built on Anthropic's Model Context Protocol standard. It exposes read/write access to Smartsheet's core work management objects... any developer with an access token can build on the platform.
s10.title: Smartsheet API now speaks AI: Introducing Smartsheet MCP server

s11.quote: The Smartsheet Model Context Protocol (MCP) server provides a way to leverage Smartsheet's public API via AI clients, allowing you to interact with your data using natural language.
s11.title: Smartsheet MCP server tools

s12.quote: This project has been deprecated. Please use the official Smartsheet MCP server instead.
s12.title: smartsheet-platform/smar-mcp - GitHub

limitations: Smartsheet is not currently listed as a dedicated Composio toolkit, though the official MCP server provides direct agent integration.
The community MCP server from StackOne offers broader tool coverage (189 actions) but is a third-party service.
The exact rate limits for the API were not documented in the pages I fetched, but the MCP page mentions standard API rate limiting applies.
Free trial users can access the API but must convert to a paid Business plan ($24/user/month) after 30 days for continued access.
